creator: ohauer@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 170094
Comware7 support

The patch Comware7 patch is flying around for quite some time and is working very well for me since nearly a year.
Don't know the reason why it hasn't found the way to the official rancid sources but perhaps it is interesting also for others rancid3 users.

PS:
I think most of the checks and warnings from post-install section should go into a dedicated pre-install script else users installing rancid from packages will never see the warnings.
